scripts.dev: concurrently --names "server,client,nlp" --prefix-colors "blue,green,yellow" "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:client" "npm run dev:nlp"
scripts.build: cd server && npm run build && cd ../client && npm run build
scripts.start: concurrently "npm run start:server" "npm run start:client" "npm run start:nlp"
scripts.setup: npm install && cd server && npm install && cd ../client && npm install && cd ../nlp-service && pip install -r requirements.txt
